name: content-publish-check
description: Tuesday and Friday morning — remind Steven to publish approved content
prompt:
Content publishing check. Review content/drafts/ for any approved content (files with status: approved in frontmatter or marked approved in #forge-pipeline). For each approved item:
1. Confirm it's ready to publish
2. Post the final version to #forge-pipeline for Alvaro's final check
3. If already approved by Alvaro, post publishing instructions

If nothing is ready, check what's in draft and post a brief status to #forge-pipeline.
